seoTitle: Swanbrook vs Swanhaven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swanbrook and Swanhaven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanbrook and Swanhaven.
heading: Swanbrook vs Swanhaven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanbrook, New South Wales and Swanhaven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanhaven has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Swanbrook (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanbrook or Swanhaven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanbrook has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Swanhaven scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanbrook scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Swanhaven scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanbrook or Swanhaven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanhaven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
